revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''8-3-220

Any sling made of chain, but more specifically a short length of chain having an elongated pear-shaped link or hook at each end, intended for the lifting of heavy loads.

{{IALAFooter}}
